quotes.text: Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Health is a state of complete harmony of the body, mind and spirit.
quotes.author: B.K.S. Iyengar

quotes.text: The first wealth is health.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: A healthy outside starts from the inside.
quotes.author: Robert Urich

quotes.text: Your body can stand almost anything. It's your mind that you have to convince.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Exercise is a celebration of what your body can do, not a punishment for what you ate.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The groundwork for all happiness is good health.
quotes.author: Leigh Hunt

quotes.text: To keep the body in good health is a duty... otherwise we shall not be able to keep our mind strong and clear.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Health is not valued till sickness comes.
quotes.author: Thomas Fuller

quotes.text: Prevention is better than cure.
quotes.author: Desiderius Erasmus

quotes.text: Good health and good sense are two of life's greatest blessings.
quotes.author: Publilius Syrus

quotes.text: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth, faithfulness the best relationship.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Choose to be optimistic, it feels better.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you react to it.
quotes.author: Charles R. Swindoll

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Smile, breathe, and go slowly.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
quotes.author: T.S. Eliot

quotes.text: Positive anything is better than negative nothing.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: Happiness is an inside job.
quotes.author: William Arthur Ward

quotes.text: The secret of happiness is freedom, the secret of freedom is courage.
quotes.author: Carrie Jones

quotes.text: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.text: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: The real measure of your wealth is how much you'd be worth if you lost all your money.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.text: The best investment you can make is in yourself.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Don't work for money; make money work for you.
quotes.author: Robert Kiyosaki

quotes.text: Rich people have small TVs and big libraries, and poor people have small libraries and big TVs.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.text: Time is more valuable than money. You can get more money, but you cannot get more time.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: It's not how much money you make, but how much money you keep, how hard it works for you, and how many generations you keep it for.
quotes.author: Robert Kiyosaki

quotes.text: Fortune favors the bold.
quotes.author: Latin Proverb

quotes.text: Wealth is the ability to fully experience life.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.text: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Your limitation—it's only your imagination.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
quotes.author: John D. Rockefeller

quotes.text: If you really look closely, most overnight successes took a long time.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: Kindness is a language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: The present moment is the only time over which we have dominion.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: Wherever you are, be there totally.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.text: Creativity is intelligence having fun.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Creativity takes courage.
quotes.author: Henri Matisse

quotes.text: Gratitude turns what we have into enough.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The unthankful heart discovers no mercies; but the thankful heart will find, in every hour, some heavenly blessings.
quotes.author: Henry Ward Beecher

quotes.text: Appreciate everything your associates do for the business.
quotes.author: Sam Walton

quotes.text: As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter words, but to live by them.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.text: Gratitude is not only the greatest of virtues, but the parent of all others.
quotes.author: Cicero

quotes.text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: The energy of the mind is the essence of life.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Life is energy, and energy is life's most precious gift.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Where focus goes, energy flows.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: The higher your energy level, the more efficient your body.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: Balance is not something you find, it's something you create.
quotes.author: Jana Kingsford

quotes.text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Harmony makes small things grow, lack of it makes great things decay.
quotes.author: Sallust

quotes.text: The art of living is a fine mingling of letting go and holding on.
quotes.author: Havelock Ellis

quotes.text: Work is not always required. There is such a thing as sacred idleness.
quotes.author: George MacDonald

quotes.text: Champions are made from something deep inside of them: a desire, a dream, a vision.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
quotes.author: Jimmy Johnson

quotes.text: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Excellence is never an accident. It is always the result of high intention, sincere effort, and intelligent execution.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: You have been assigned this mountain to show others it can be moved.
quotes.author: Mel Robbins

quotes.text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
quotes.author: Japanese Proverb

quotes.text: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.text: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The privilege of a lifetime is being who you are.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.text: Love yourself first and everything else falls into line.
quotes.author: Lucille Ball

quotes.text: You yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Confidence comes not from always being right but from not fearing to be wrong.
quotes.author: Peter T. Mcintyre

quotes.text: If you want to fly, you have to give up what weighs you down.
quotes.author: Toni Morrison

quotes.text: The secret to getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
quotes.author: Karen Lamb

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: Don't wait for opportunity. Create it.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
quotes.author: Norman Vaughan

quotes.text: All our dreams can come true if we have the courage to pursue them.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: A dream doesn't become reality through magic; it takes sweat, determination and hard work.
quotes.author: Colin Powell

quotes.text: The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: What we think, we become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: The mind is a powerful force. It can enslave us or empower us.
quotes.author: David Cuschieri

quotes.text: You are what you think about all day long.
quotes.author: Robert Schuller

quotes.text: Change your thoughts and you change your world.
quotes.author: Norman Vincent Peale

quotes.text: The pessimist sees difficulty in every opportunity. The optimist sees opportunity in every difficulty.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.text: In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.text: Hope is the thing with feathers that perches in the soul.
quotes.author: Emily Dickinson

quotes.text: Once you choose hope, anything's possible.
quotes.author: Christopher Reeve

quotes.text: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency. Consistent hard work leads to success.
quotes.author: Dwayne Johnson

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: Progress, not perfection.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Comparison is the thief of joy.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Be content with what you have; rejoice in the way things are.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Contentment is natural wealth, luxury is artificial poverty.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: Health is the crown on the well person's head that only the ill person can see.
quotes.author: Robin Sharma

quotes.text: A man too busy to take care of his health is like a mechanic too busy to take care of his tools.
quotes.author: Spanish Proverb

quotes.text: Those who think they have no time for bodily exercise will sooner or later have to find time for illness.
quotes.author: Edward Stanley

quotes.text: Healing is a matter of time, but it is sometimes also a matter of opportunity.
quotes.author: Hippocrates

quotes.text: The doctor of the future will give no medicines, but will interest his patients in the care of the human frame, in diet, and in the cause and prevention of disease.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: The most wasted of all days is one without laughter.
quotes.author: E.E. Cummings

quotes.text: Joy is not in things; it is in us.
quotes.author: Richard Wagner

quotes.text: Find joy in the ordinary.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Choose joy. It's a choice you can make right now.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you respond to it.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.text: Your attitude determines your direction.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: A positive attitude gives you power over your circumstances instead of your circumstances having power over you.
quotes.author: Joyce Meyer

quotes.text: The only disability in life is a bad attitude.
quotes.author: Scott Hamilton

quotes.text: Attitude is a little thing that makes a big difference.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Change is the end result of all true learning.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.text: The capacity to learn is a gift; the ability to learn is a skill; the willingness to learn is a choice.
quotes.author: Brian Herbert

quotes.text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: The more that you read, the more things you will know. The more that you learn, the more places you'll go.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The only thing that interferes with my learning is my education.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Knowledge is power.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.text: The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you.
quotes.author: B.B. King

quotes.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Focus on the journey, not the destination. Joy is found not in finishing an activity but in doing it.
quotes.author: Greg Anderson

quotes.text: Every master was once a beginner. Every pro was once an amateur. Every icon was once an unknown.
quotes.author: Robin Sharma

quotes.text: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
quotes.author: Helen Hayes

quotes.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.text: A goal is not always meant to be reached, it often serves simply as something to aim at.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
quotes.author: Bo Jackson

quotes.text: Goals are dreams with deadlines.
quotes.author: Diana Scharf

quotes.text: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.text: By failing to prepare, you are preparing to fail.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: If you fail to plan, you plan to fail.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Success is where preparation and opportunity meet.
quotes.author: Bobby Unser

quotes.text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
quotes.author: Chris Grosser

quotes.text: The pessimist sees difficulty in every opportunity. The optimist sees opportunity in every difficulty.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Your perspective on life comes from the cage you were held captive in.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.text: It's not what you look at that matters, it's what you see.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it, move with it, and join the dance.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Change your life today. Don't gamble on the future, act now, without delay.
quotes.author: Simone de Beauvoir

quotes.text: Progress is impossible without change, and those who cannot change their minds cannot change anything.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.text: If you don't like something, change it. If you can't change it, change your attitude.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.text: The power of now is the power of presence.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.text: Be present in all things and thankful for all things.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Life is available only in the present moment.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: The present moment is the only moment available to us, and it is the door to all moments.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
quotes.author: Suzy Kassem

quotes.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
quotes.author: Christian D. Larson

quotes.text: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
quotes.author: A.A. Milne

quotes.text: Trust yourself. You know more than you think you do.
quotes.author: Benjamin Spock

quotes.text: The way to develop self-confidence is to do the thing you fear and get a record of successful experiences behind you.
quotes.author: William Jennings Bryan

quotes.text: Self-confidence is the first requisite to great undertakings.
quotes.author: Samuel Johnson

quotes.text: With confidence, you have won before you have started.
quotes.author: Marcus Garvey

quotes.text: Confidence is not 'they will like me'. Confidence is 'I'll be fine if they don't'.
quotes.author: Christina Grimmie

quotes.text: Nothing can dim the light that shines from within.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: You are enough just as you are.
quotes.author: Meghan Markle

quotes.text: Your value doesn't decrease based on someone's inability to see your worth.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Know your worth. Then add tax.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: You are valuable because you exist. Not because of what you do or what you have done, but simply because you are.
quotes.author: Max Lucado
